description: Tools for the unified booking management engine. All booking lifecycle operations (list, detail, update, cancel, QR, iCal) go through these endpoints regardless of booking type. The Vibe Booking AI agent uses these to manage existing bookings and create multi-item template bookings.

tools.name: create_template_booking
tools.description: Create a multi-item booking (template path) with a 15-minute hold. Use for trip packages or when booking multiple resource types together. Each item specifies its type, resourceId, dates, quantity, and unit price. Returns a BookingDetail with all items.

Idempotency-Key.description: Optional unique key to prevent duplicate bookings on retry

tripTemplateId.description: Optional: UUID of the trip template that seeded this itinerary (M2 private packages)

items.description: List of items to book (must have at least one)

resourceId.description: UUID of the resource to book

quantity.description: Quantity (e.g. nights for hotel, days for guide)

specialRequests.description: Special requests for the whole booking (max 1000 chars)

tools.returns: BookingDetail with id, reference, status (HOLD), totalUsd, subtotalUsd, expiresAt (15 min), items[]

tools.name: list_bookings
tools.description: List all bookings for the authenticated user, filterable by status and method. Use to show the user their upcoming, past, or cancelled bookings.
tools.returns: Paginated list of Booking objects with id, reference, method, status, totalUsd, startDate, endDate

tools.name: get_booking_detail
tools.description: Get full details of a specific booking including all items, pricing, hold expiry, and cancellation info.
tools.returns: BookingDetail with items[] (bookingType, resourceId, startDate, endDate, quantity, unitPriceUsd, subtotalUsd, snapshot)

tools.name: update_booking
tools.description: Update a booking that is still in HOLD status. Allows modifying dates, guest counts, or special requests. Only works on HOLD bookings — confirmed bookings must be cancelled instead.

tools.name: cancel_booking
tools.description: Cancel an existing booking. Refund amount depends on the cancellation policy and time before the start date. Always confirm with the user before calling — cancellation is irreversible.
tools.returns: Updated BookingDetail with status CANCELLED, refundPercentage, cancelledAt

tools.name: get_booking_qr
tools.description: Get the QR code for a confirmed booking. Use when the user needs their booking QR code for check-in at a hotel, tour meeting point, or transport pickup.

tools.name: get_booking_ical
tools.description: Download an iCalendar (.ics) file for a booking. Returns a text/calendar response with Content-Disposition attachment header. Use when the user wants to add the booking to their calendar.
